comment: Declarative description of the agent FSM. planner.py is the source of truth in code; this file documents the 12 required states, their entry action, guard and possible next states.

INGRESS.description: Receive the user question and files, create the initial state

DETECT_MODALITIES.description: Inspect the files and detect which modalities are available

SELECT_TOOLS.description: Choose the tools to run according to the detected modalities

PLAN_NEXT_ACTION.description: Decide the next action: run a pending tool, or move on to validation

ACT.description: Execute one selected tool to extract evidence from a single source

OBSERVE.description: Observe the raw tool result and update the external state

EXTRACT_EVIDENCE.description: Record the observed result as a normalized evidence item, then plan again

VALIDATE.description: Check that the evidence is grounded and spans at least two modalities

ERROR_RECOVERY.description: A tool failed; retry it or fall back, while retries are below the limit

RESPOND.description: Render the final grounded answer with confidence and used modalities

CLARIFY.description: Evidence is insufficient; ask the user for more information

DONE.description: Terminal state: the agent has finished its run
